# Qefro — llm.txt / llms.txt
# Answer-engine friendly summary for crawlers and AI systems.

name: Qefro
url: https://qefro.com
app: https://app.qefro.com
api: https://api.qefro.com
contact: support@qefro.com
category: AI Workspace Platform

## What is Qefro?
Qefro is an AI Workspace Platform for organizations. Configure once in the Admin Console, deploy Customer AI on website and WhatsApp, and give employees a branded Internal Portal (yourcompany.qefro.com). Everything shares one knowledge platform, one permission system, and one set of business actions. Most AI platforms answer questions; Qefro also securely performs business actions using your organization's knowledge, APIs, and permissions.

## Core message
Configure once. Deploy everywhere. — Customer AI, Employee AI, Admin Console — from one centralized AI platform.

## Pricing
- Free: $0 — 100 conversations, knowledge for getting started, connect 1 business system (no credit card required)
- Starter: $29/month billed annually ($348/year) or $39/month monthly — knowledge for one team, connect up to 5 business systems
- Growth: $99/month billed annually ($1,188/year) or $119/month monthly — WhatsApp + unlimited business system connections
- Enterprise: Custom — unlimited usage options, private deployment, SSO/SAML (roadmap), dedicated CSM, SLA
- Annual billing saves ~26% vs monthly

## Key capabilities
- AI Workspaces: per-team contexts (e.g. Customer Support, HR, IT) with own knowledge, instructions, business actions, conversations, and permissions — every workspace has its own isolated knowledge base
- Knowledge: PDFs, DOCX, Markdown, TXT, website crawling, OCR for scans/images, multilingual RAG (EN, AR, TA, HI+), hybrid BM25+vector retrieval, source citations, refuses when no relevant source, workspace isolation
- Business Actions (powered by Business Tools): REST APIs, OpenAPI import, encrypted credentials, end-user identity via identify(), SSRF/DNS-pinned webhooks, execution logs (MCP on roadmap). Actions such as order lookup or ticket creation run via customer APIs — Qefro does not replace CRM/ERP systems of record
- Experiences: Website widget (short-lived JWT auth), Internal Portal for employees, WhatsApp (Growth+), voice STT/TTS in widget, WebSocket streaming, handoff to human agents, lead capture
- Admin Console: workspaces, teams/RBAC (Owner/Admin/Member), branding, widget/WhatsApp setup, analytics, inbox, billing
- Security: end-user identity forwarding, zero-trust style authorization for actions, audit/execution logs, multi-tenant isolation, workspace/conversation isolation, encrypted secrets; SOC 2 compliance is on the roadmap (contact Sales for timeline); SSO and platform admin audit trail on Enterprise roadmap
- Developer: identify() widget API for JWT/session identity — no RAG infra, vector DB, or LLM hosting to run yourself

## Who it is for
Organizations that need AI across customer support and internal operations — Customer Support, HR, IT, Sales, Finance, Engineering — and industries including SaaS, healthcare, education, manufacturing, retail, professional services, and government.

# Expanded Landing Specifications & Direct Answers


## AI Customer Support (https://qefro.com/ai-customer-support)
Kind: Topic
Title: AI Customer Support Platform | Qefro
Description: Qefro AI customer support answers from your knowledge base, runs secure business actions, and works on website chat and WhatsApp.
Direct Answer: Qefro is an AI customer support platform that grounds answers in your docs and APIs, then takes secure actions — not just chat replies.
Overview: Generic chatbots often invent answers. Qefro retrieves from your verified content, cites sources, and is designed to decline when nothing relevant exists — so support stays accurate. Beyond Q&A, connect order, billing, and ticketing systems via REST/OpenAPI or the Backend SDK so the assistant can look up live status, create tickets, and hand off to humans with full context. Deploy Customer AI on your website widget and WhatsApp from one Admin Console, with workspace isolation, RBAC, and encrypted secrets.
Key Capabilities:
- Grounded answers with source citations
- Secure business actions through your APIs
- Website widget + WhatsApp channels
- Human handoff and lead capture
- 14-day free trial — no credit card
FAQs:
  Q: How is Qefro different from a basic AI chatbot?
  A: Qefro combines knowledge retrieval with secure business actions, workspace permissions, and channels for both customers and employees — not chat-only demos.
  Q: Can it create tickets or look up orders?
  A: Yes. Connect your helpdesk or order APIs as Business Tools, or use the Backend SDK so actions run with the end-user’s identity.

## AI Chatbot for Business (https://qefro.com/ai-chatbot)
Kind: Topic
Title: AI Chatbot for Business | Qefro
Description: Build a business AI chatbot with Qefro: multilingual RAG, citations, WhatsApp, website widget, and secure API actions.
Direct Answer: Qefro’s business AI chatbot answers from your company knowledge and can execute approved actions in your systems.
Overview: Most chatbot tools stop at conversation. Qefro indexes PDFs, sites, and docs, then answers with citations across languages including English, Arabic, Tamil, and Hindi. When customers need more than text — order status, refunds, appointment links — Business Tools call your APIs with encrypted credentials or forwarded identity. One platform covers Customer AI, Employee AI, and an Admin Console so you configure knowledge and permissions once.
Key Capabilities:
- Hybrid retrieval (keyword + vectors)
- OCR for scans and image PDFs
- Widget JWT auth and streaming replies
- Internal Portal for employee chatbots
- Refuse when the knowledge base has no answer

## Website AI Chat (https://qefro.com/website-ai-chat)
Kind: Topic
Title: Website AI Chat Widget | Qefro
Description: Add website AI chat with Qefro’s embeddable widget — grounded answers, voice options, lead capture, and secure business actions.
Direct Answer: Embed Qefro’s website AI chat widget to answer visitors from your knowledge base and trigger secure actions on your stack.
Overview: Install with a short script and widget token. Messages stream over WebSocket, stay size-bounded, and can scrub PII before model calls. Visitors get answers grounded in your site crawl and uploaded docs. When they need a human, hand off to your team inbox with conversation context. Optional voice STT/TTS in the widget helps mobile and accessibility use cases without a separate product.
Key Capabilities:
- One-line embed for your site
- Crawl your public site into the knowledge base
- Lead capture forms in-chat
- Brand colors and welcome message
- Works with identify() for signed-in users

## WhatsApp AI Agent (https://qefro.com/whatsapp-ai-agent)
Kind: Topic
Title: WhatsApp AI Agent for Business | Qefro
Description: Run a WhatsApp AI agent with Qefro — same knowledge and business actions as your website chat, with Starter+ WhatsApp support.
Direct Answer: Qefro’s WhatsApp AI agent uses the same workspaces, knowledge, and Business Tools as your website assistant.
Overview: Customers already live in WhatsApp. Connect the channel once in the Admin Console so policies, FAQs, and API actions stay consistent with web chat. Identity-aware actions let authenticated flows look up accounts or create tickets without storing end-user passwords in Qefro. Available on Starter and above so growing teams can add messaging without rebuilding RAG infrastructure.
Key Capabilities:
- Shared knowledge with website Customer AI
- Business actions via REST/OpenAPI or SDK
- Handoff path to human agents
- Workspace-scoped instructions and tools
- Audit-friendly execution logs

## Multilingual AI Chatbot (https://qefro.com/multilingual-ai-chatbot)
Kind: Topic
Title: Multilingual AI Chatbot | Qefro
Description: Multilingual AI chatbot with Qefro RAG — English, Arabic, Tamil, Hindi and more, with OCR and source citations.
Direct Answer: Qefro’s multilingual AI chatbot retrieves and answers across languages using hybrid search, OCR, and citations.
Overview: Global teams need support that matches the customer’s language without separate bots per locale. Qefro indexes mixed-language corpora in isolated workspaces. OCR helps scanned PDFs and image-heavy manuals stay searchable. Hybrid BM25 + vector retrieval improves recall for short queries and proper nouns. Refusal behavior reduces hallucinations when the corpus has no matching content — critical for regulated copy in every language.
Key Capabilities:
- EN, AR, TA, HI and more
- OCR for non-Latin scanned docs
- Per-workspace language content
- Cited sources in answers
- Website and WhatsApp channels

## RAG Chatbot (https://qefro.com/rag-chatbot)
Kind: Topic
Title: RAG Chatbot Platform | Qefro
Description: Deploy a production RAG chatbot with Qefro — hybrid retrieval, citations, refusal when unsure, and optional API actions.
Direct Answer: Qefro is a production RAG chatbot platform: chunk, embed, retrieve, cite — then optionally act through your APIs.
Overview: Retrieval-augmented generation only works if retrieval is reliable. Qefro combines dense vectors with full-text search and workspace filters for tenant-safe results. Every answer can cite source documents. When retrieval is empty or weak, the assistant is designed to say it does not know instead of guessing. Add Business Tools when chat must change state — refunds, lookups, tickets — with encrypted secrets and execution logs.
Key Capabilities:
- Document + website ingestion
- Hybrid BM25 + vector search
- Source citations and grounding
- Tenant and workspace isolation
- Benchmark methodology published
FAQs:
  Q: Do I host my own vector database?
  A: No. Qefro runs retrieval infrastructure for you. You upload content and configure workspaces in the Admin Console.

## Document Chat AI (https://qefro.com/document-chat-ai)
Kind: Topic
Title: Document Chat AI | Ask PDFs with Qefro
Description: Chat with PDFs, DOCX, Markdown, and crawled pages using Qefro document chat AI — citations, OCR, and workspace isolation.
Direct Answer: Qefro document chat AI lets teams ask questions over PDFs and docs with citations — and optional actions when APIs are connected.
Overview: Upload handbooks, contracts, and product manuals. Qefro chunks and indexes them per workspace so HR content never leaks into a public support bot. OCR unlocks scanned packets. Employees use the Internal Portal; customers use the website widget against public workspaces only. Combine document answers with Business Tools when the next step is submitting a form or opening a ticket in your system of record.
Key Capabilities:
- PDF, DOCX, Markdown, TXT
- Website crawl into the same index
- OCR for image-based PDFs
- Cited passages in answers
- Private vs public workspaces

## Customer Support Automation (https://qefro.com/customer-support-automation)
Kind: Topic
Title: Customer Support Automation | Qefro
Description: Automate customer support with Qefro — deflection for FAQs, API actions for live data, and human handoff when needed.
Direct Answer: Qefro customer support automation deflects routine questions, executes approved API actions, and escalates with context.
Overview: Automation fails when it hides humans. Qefro keeps handoff first-class: agents see the thread, sources, and tool runs. Automate the repetitive layer — shipping status, password reset links via your API, policy quotes — while complex cases reach people faster. Measure quality with grounded answers and refusal behavior instead of vanity “messages answered” metrics alone.
Key Capabilities:
- FAQ and policy deflection
- Live data via Business Tools
- Inbox handoff for agents
- Lead capture for sales-assist flows
- Analytics on conversations

## Helpdesk AI (https://qefro.com/helpdesk-ai)
Kind: Topic
Title: Helpdesk AI Software | Qefro
Description: Helpdesk AI with Qefro: grounded answers, ticket creation via your APIs, Internal Portal for agents, and audit-friendly logs.
Direct Answer: Use Qefro as helpdesk AI that answers from docs and creates tickets in your existing helpdesk through secure integrations.
Overview: Qefro does not replace your CRM or ticketing system of record. It sits in front with knowledge and actions that call your APIs. Agents and employees can use the Internal Portal for runbooks while customers use the widget — same Admin Console configuration. Execution logs show which tools ran, supporting QA and compliance reviews.
Key Capabilities:
- Create tickets via OpenAPI/REST
- Runbook and SOP retrieval
- Employee + customer surfaces
- RBAC and workspace isolation
- Encrypted integration secrets

## Knowledge Base AI (https://qefro.com/knowledge-base-ai)
Kind: Topic
Title: Knowledge Base AI | Qefro
Description: Turn your knowledge base into AI answers with Qefro — uploads, site crawl, multilingual RAG, citations, and workspace isolation.
Direct Answer: Qefro knowledge base AI turns documents and crawled pages into grounded conversational answers with citations.
Overview: Static FAQ pages go stale. Keep a living knowledge base in workspaces and let Customer AI and Employee AI share the same indexed content with different visibility. Hybrid retrieval helps both exact policy IDs and natural-language questions. OCR covers legacy scans. When content is missing, refusal beats a wrong answer — especially for legal, medical, or financial copy.
Key Capabilities:
- Upload and crawl into one index
- Per-workspace knowledge isolation
- Multilingual retrieval
- Source citations
- Admin Console governance

## AI for Hospitals (https://qefro.com/ai-for-hospitals)
Kind: Industry
Title: AI for Hospitals | Internal & Patient Support | Qefro
Description: AI for hospitals with Qefro: protocol lookup for staff, patient-facing FAQs with citations, tenant isolation, and secure API actions.
Direct Answer: Hospitals use Qefro for staff protocol lookup and carefully scoped patient FAQs — with isolation, citations, and optional secure actions.
Overview: Clinical and operational teams need fast access to protocols without chatting across department boundaries. Workspaces keep nursing, IT, and HR knowledge separated. Patient-facing bots should stick to approved public content and refuse medical advice outside the knowledge base. Qefro’s grounding and refusal design support that posture. Enterprise options include private deployment discussions for organizations with stricter hosting requirements.
Key Capabilities:
- Workspace isolation for departments
- Cited answers from approved docs
- PII scrubbing on model calls
- Audit and execution logs
- Private deployment conversations for Enterprise
FAQs:
  Q: Is Qefro a clinical decision system?
  A: No. Qefro retrieves and acts on content and APIs you configure. It is not a diagnostic device and should only use approved knowledge.

## AI for Hotels (https://qefro.com/ai-for-hotels)
Kind: Industry
Title: AI for Hotels | Guest & Staff Assistants | Qefro
Description: AI for hotels: guest website and WhatsApp answers, staff Internal Portal for SOPs, and booking or PMS actions via your APIs.
Direct Answer: Hotels use Qefro for guest FAQs on web and WhatsApp plus staff SOP assistants — with optional PMS or booking API actions.
Overview: Guests ask about amenities, check-in, and local tips. Ground answers in your property content and escalate edge cases to the front desk with handoff. Staff use the Internal Portal for housekeeping and security SOPs without exposing those docs on the public widget. Connect booking or loyalty APIs as Business Tools when you want the assistant to fetch reservation status securely.
Key Capabilities:
- Multilingual guest support
- WhatsApp for travelers
- Staff-only workspaces
- API actions for live reservation data
- Brandable widget

## AI for Schools (https://qefro.com/ai-for-schools)
Kind: Industry
Title: AI for Schools & Universities | Qefro
Description: AI for schools: student and parent FAQs, staff policy portals, multilingual RAG, and integrations with your SIS or ticketing APIs.
Direct Answer: Schools and universities use Qefro for admissions FAQs, campus services, and staff policy assistants with workspace isolation.
Overview: Parents and students need consistent answers about calendars, fees, and procedures. Keep public content in a public workspace and internal HR in a private one. Multilingual retrieval helps diverse communities. OCR covers scanned circulars and handwritten-adjacent scans when digitized. Ticket creation via your helpdesk API keeps IT and registrar workflows in systems you already trust.
Key Capabilities:
- Admissions and campus FAQ bots
- Staff Internal Portal
- Multilingual knowledge
- Helpdesk API actions
- Role-based access

## AI for SaaS (https://qefro.com/ai-for-saas)
Kind: Industry
Title: AI for SaaS Companies | Qefro
Description: AI for SaaS: in-app or website support, docs RAG, identify() for logged-in users, and product API actions for account tasks.
Direct Answer: SaaS teams use Qefro to turn product docs into support AI — with identity-aware actions for signed-in customers.
Overview: Deflect “how do I…” tickets with cited docs, then use identify() so billing or workspace actions run as the real user against your APIs. Employee AI helps CS and success teams search runbooks while Customer AI stays on public and authenticated experiences you choose. OpenAPI import speeds connecting your existing customer-facing APIs as Business Tools.
Key Capabilities:
- Docs + changelog ingestion
- identify() for authenticated chat
- OpenAPI Business Tools
- In-app or marketing-site widget
- Growth plan WhatsApp option

## AI for Ecommerce (https://qefro.com/ai-for-ecommerce)
Kind: Industry
Title: AI for Ecommerce | Orders, Policies & Chat | Qefro
Description: AI for ecommerce: policy answers with citations, order tracking via your APIs, website and WhatsApp chat, and human handoff.
Direct Answer: Ecommerce brands use Qefro for policy Q&A, order lookups through your APIs, and WhatsApp or website chat with handoff.
Overview: Shoppers ask about shipping, returns, and sizing. Ground answers in your policies and product content; refuse when SKU data is not in the knowledge base. Connect order and subscription APIs so “where is my order?” returns live tracking instead of a generic script. Handoff preserves cart and conversation context for agents during peak seasons.
Key Capabilities:
- Returns and shipping policy RAG
- Order API business actions
- WhatsApp for post-purchase support
- Lead capture for abandoned-cart assists
- Workspace separation for brands

## AI for Manufacturing (https://qefro.com/ai-for-manufacturing)
Kind: Industry
Title: AI for Manufacturing | SOPs & Ops AI | Qefro
Description: AI for manufacturing: SOP and safety doc chat for operators, engineering runbooks, OCR for manuals, and optional MES/ticket APIs.
Direct Answer: Manufacturers use Qefro so operators and engineers can query SOPs and runbooks with citations — plus optional plant system actions.
Overview: Paper manuals and PDF equipment packs are hard to search on the floor. OCR and document chat make procedures findable in the Internal Portal. Keep safety-critical content in controlled workspaces with RBAC. Public marketing chat stays separate from plant knowledge. Integrate ticketing or maintenance APIs when the assistant should open work orders instead of only quoting a PDF.
Key Capabilities:
- SOP and safety document RAG
- OCR for equipment manuals
- Operator Internal Portal
- Maintenance ticket actions
- Audit-friendly logs

Title: AI for Real Estate | Listing & Client AI | Qefro
Description: AI for real estate: listing and brochure chat, agent Internal Portal, lead capture, and CRM actions via your APIs.
Direct Answer: Real estate teams use Qefro to answer listing questions, capture leads, and assist agents with internal playbooks.
Overview: Buyers ask about amenities, fees, and availability. Ground public answers in listing packs and site content; push hot leads into your CRM through Business Tools. Agents use Employee AI for compliance scripts and transaction checklists without exposing them on the public widget. Multilingual chat helps cross-border and diaspora buyers engage in their preferred language.
Key Capabilities:
- Listing and brochure RAG
- Website lead capture
- CRM/API follow-ups
- Agent Internal Portal
- Multilingual support

Kind: Industry
Title: AI for Travel & Tourism | Qefro
Description: AI for travel: itinerary and policy FAQs, WhatsApp traveler support, multilingual RAG, and booking system actions via APIs.
Direct Answer: Travel companies use Qefro for traveler FAQs on web and WhatsApp, with optional booking API lookups and multilingual RAG.
Overview: Travelers message at odd hours about visas, baggage, and changes. Keep answers cited from your published policies and escalate exceptions to humans. WhatsApp reaches travelers on the move. Share the same knowledge as your website assistant for consistency. Connect booking engines as Business Tools when you want authenticated itinerary status without building a custom RAG stack.
Key Capabilities:
- Policy and itinerary FAQs
- WhatsApp traveler support
- Multilingual retrieval
- Booking API actions
- Human handoff

## Live Chat (https://qefro.com/live-chat)
Kind: Feature
Title: Live Chat with AI + Humans | Qefro
Description: Qefro live chat combines AI answers on your website with human handoff, lead capture, and optional API actions.
Direct Answer: Qefro live chat starts with grounded AI replies and hands off to humans when needed — with full thread context.
Overview: Visitors open the widget for instant answers from your knowledge base. When they ask for a person, agents continue in the team inbox. Lead capture collects emails mid-conversation for sales-assist flows without a separate form tool. Pair live chat with Business Tools so “track my order” hits your API instead of a canned reply.
Key Capabilities:
- Website widget live chat
- AI deflection + human handoff
- Lead capture
- Streaming responses
- Brandable UI

## Voice AI (https://qefro.com/voice-ai)
Kind: Feature
Title: Voice AI in Website Chat | Qefro
Description: Qefro Voice AI adds speech-to-text and text-to-speech inside the website widget for hands-free customer support.
Direct Answer: Use Qefro Voice AI in the website widget so visitors can speak questions and hear answers without a separate voice product.
Overview: Voice lowers friction on mobile and for accessibility. STT/TTS runs in the widget experience alongside text chat. Answers still come from your RAG knowledge and can trigger the same Business Tools as typed messages. Keep voice on Customer AI surfaces you enable — internal teams can continue with text in the Internal Portal.
Key Capabilities:
- STT and TTS in the widget
- Same knowledge as text chat
- Works with business actions
- Optional per deployment
- Pairs with live chat handoff

## Knowledge Base (https://qefro.com/knowledge-base)
Kind: Feature
Title: AI Knowledge Base | Qefro
Description: Qefro knowledge base features: uploads, crawl, OCR, multilingual hybrid RAG, citations, and per-workspace isolation.
Direct Answer: The Qefro knowledge base powers grounded answers for Customer AI and Employee AI with citations and isolation.
Overview: Each workspace gets its own index so public support content never mixes with confidential HR files. Ingest PDFs, DOCX, Markdown, TXT, and crawled pages. OCR covers scans. Hybrid search improves tough queries. Govern from the Admin Console: who can upload, which channels can read which workspace, and how tools are scoped.
Key Capabilities:
- Multi-format ingestion
- Website crawl
- OCR
- Citations and refusal
- Workspace isolation

## Website Crawl (https://qefro.com/website-crawl)
Kind: Feature
Title: Website Crawl for AI Knowledge | Qefro
Description: Crawl your website into Qefro’s knowledge base so Customer AI stays updated with public pages and FAQs.
Direct Answer: Qefro website crawl indexes your public pages into a workspace knowledge base for grounded chat answers.
Overview: Keep marketing and help center pages in sync without manual copy-paste into a bot CMS. Combine crawl with PDF uploads for deeper manuals that are not on the public site. Re-crawl when content changes so answers track your latest policies.
Key Capabilities:
- Automated site ingestion
- Pairs with document uploads
- Workspace-scoped indexes
- Feeds website and WhatsApp AI
- Admin Console controls

## WhatsApp AI (https://qefro.com/whatsapp-ai)
Kind: Feature
Title: WhatsApp AI Channel | Qefro
Description: Enable WhatsApp AI on Qefro Starter+ — shared knowledge and business actions with your website Customer AI.
Direct Answer: Qefro WhatsApp AI uses the same workspaces, retrieval, and Business Tools as your website assistant.
Overview: Configure WhatsApp in the Admin Console instead of maintaining a second bot stack. Customers get consistent answers whether they message on-site or in WhatsApp. Available on Starter and higher plans with Growth unlocking unlimited business system connections.
Key Capabilities:
- Shared RAG knowledge
- Business Tool actions
- Handoff-ready threads
- Starter+ availability
- Admin Console setup

## Internal AI (https://qefro.com/internal-ai)
Kind: Feature
Title: Internal AI Portal for Employees | Qefro
Description: Qefro Internal AI gives employees a branded portal for workspace chat, documents, citations, and secure internal actions.
Direct Answer: Employee AI on Qefro is a branded Internal Portal — workspaces, conversations, documents, and citations for your teams.
Overview: HR, IT, Finance, and Engineering each get isolated knowledge and tools under one organization. Hosted as yourcompany.qefro.com style experiences so employees have a clear place to ask and act. Same security model as Customer AI: RBAC, encryption, and optional API actions with identity controls.
Key Capabilities:
- Branded Internal Portal
- Per-team workspaces
- Document chat with citations
- Internal Business Tools
- Owner/Admin/Member roles

## Analytics (https://qefro.com/analytics)
Kind: Feature
Title: AI Conversation Analytics | Qefro
Description: Qefro analytics help you monitor conversations, channels, and assistant usage from the Admin Console.
Direct Answer: Use Qefro analytics in the Admin Console to understand conversation volume and how Customer AI and Employee AI are used.
Overview: See where demand concentrates — widget, WhatsApp, or internal portal — and which workspaces are busiest. Pair analytics with execution logs when debugging Business Tool runs. Improve content where refusal rates or handoffs signal knowledge gaps.
Key Capabilities:
- Conversation and channel insights
- Admin Console dashboards
- Supports content iteration
- Complements audit logs
- Org-wide visibility for owners

## Team Inbox (https://qefro.com/team-inbox)
Kind: Feature
Title: Team Inbox & Human Handoff | Qefro
Description: Qefro team inbox receives human handoffs from AI chat with full conversation context for support agents.
Direct Answer: The Qefro team inbox lets agents take over AI conversations with history, sources, and tool context intact.
Overview: Customers should never restart their story after escalation. Handoff brings the thread to humans cleanly. Use inbox workflows alongside AI deflection so routine questions never reach agents. Owners and admins manage access through RBAC so only the right teams see customer conversations.
Key Capabilities:
- AI-to-human handoff
- Full thread context
- Works with website chat
- RBAC-aware access
- Pairs with analytics

## RAG (https://qefro.com/rag)
Kind: Feature
Title: RAG Retrieval for Business AI | Qefro
Description: Qefro RAG: hybrid BM25 + vector retrieval, multilingual indexing, citations, workspace filters, and refusal when unsure.
Direct Answer: Qefro’s RAG stack retrieves only from your tenant’s content with hybrid search, citations, and safe refusals.
Overview: Production RAG needs filters for tenant and workspace, not a single shared index. Qefro isolates by design. Hybrid search helps exact IDs and fuzzy questions. Multilingual and OCR expand what you can index. Publishable benchmark methodology explains how we think about accuracy and refusal — not vanity chat scores.
Key Capabilities:
- Hybrid retrieval
- Citations
- Workspace filters
- Multilingual + OCR
- Managed infrastructure

## API (https://qefro.com/api)
Kind: Feature
Title: Qefro API & Backend SDK
Description: Use the Qefro API surface and Backend SDK for identity, tool callbacks, and secure business actions alongside REST/OpenAPI tools.
Direct Answer: Integrate with Qefro via REST/OpenAPI Business Tools or the Backend SDK for auth and workflow control.
Overview: Import OpenAPI specs to expose existing APIs as assistant tools with encrypted credentials. Prefer the Backend SDK when authentication and multi-step workflows must stay in your service. identify() forwards end-user identity into chat so actions authorize as the real user.
Key Capabilities:
- OpenAPI import
- REST Business Tools
- Backend SDK
- identify() identity forwarding
- Execution logs

## SSO (https://qefro.com/sso)
Kind: Feature
Title: SSO / SAML for Qefro (Roadmap)
Description: SSO and SAML are on the Qefro Enterprise roadmap. Today: email OTP auth, RBAC, and identity forwarding for actions.
Direct Answer: SSO/SAML is on Qefro’s Enterprise roadmap. Today organizations use email OTP, RBAC, and identify() for end-user actions.
Overview: We list SSO honestly as roadmap so buyers can plan identity strategy without surprise marketing claims. Current controls still include workspace RBAC, tenant isolation, and encrypted secrets. Contact Sales for Enterprise identity timelines and private deployment options.
Key Capabilities:
- SSO/SAML on Enterprise roadmap
- Email OTP today (no password store)
- Owner/Admin/Member RBAC
- identify() for customer identity
- Talk to Sales for roadmap dates

## Integrations (https://qefro.com/integrations)
Kind: Feature
Title: Integrations | REST, OpenAPI & SDK | Qefro
Description: Qefro integrations connect your APIs as Business Tools via REST/OpenAPI or the Backend SDK — with encrypted secrets and logs.
Direct Answer: Integrate Qefro with your stack through REST/OpenAPI Business Tools or the Backend SDK — no rip-and-replace of systems of record.
Overview: Import an OpenAPI document or configure REST endpoints. Credentials stay encrypted at rest. Outbound calls use HTTPS with SSRF protections. Execution logs support debugging and audits. Use the SDK when you need custom auth or multi-step workflows behind your firewall.
Key Capabilities:
- OpenAPI import
- REST tools
- Backend SDK
- Encrypted secrets
- SSRF-aware webhooks

## Audit Logs (https://qefro.com/audit-logs)
Kind: Feature
Title: Audit & Execution Logs | Qefro
Description: Qefro audit and execution logs attach conversation history and Business Tool runs for accountability and review.
Direct Answer: Qefro keeps conversation and Business Tool execution logs so teams can review what the assistant answered and which actions ran.
Overview: Support QA and compliance stakeholders need evidence — not black-box chat. Logs show tool invocations alongside threads. Combine with RBAC so only authorized roles inspect sensitive conversations. Platform-wide admin audit trail enhancements remain on the Enterprise roadmap; execution logs are available for Business Tools today.
Key Capabilities:
- Conversation history
- Business Tool execution logs
- Supports QA reviews
- Works with RBAC
- Enterprise audit roadmap items

## AI Customer Support for Dental Clinics (https://qefro.com/ai-customer-support-for-dental-clinics)
Kind: Vertical
Title: AI Customer Support for Dental Clinics | Qefro
Description: AI customer support for dental clinics with Qefro — grounded answers for patients, website and WhatsApp chat, secure API actions, and an Internal Portal for staff.
Direct Answer: Qefro provides AI customer support for dental clinics: cited answers for patients, optional WhatsApp, secure business actions, and staff assistants in one AI Workspace Platform.
Overview: AI customer support for dental clinics helps patients get fast, accurate answers about your dental practice — without hiring a 24/7 team for every repetitive question. Typical questions include “Do you accept my insurance?”, “How do I prepare for a root canal?”, and “Can I reschedule my cleaning?”. Qefro grounds replies in your uploaded policies, crawled site pages, and handbooks, with source citations and refusal when nothing relevant exists. When chat must do more than answer, connect your systems: look up appointment slots via your scheduling api; create a front-desk ticket for insurance questions; send post-visit care instructions from approved docs. Credentials stay encrypted; actions can use end-user identity via identify(). Staff get a branded Internal Portal for hygiene protocols, fee guides, and front-desk scripts, while Customer AI stays on the channels you enable. Website widget for new patients; optional WhatsApp for reminders and FAQs. Keep clinical advice limited to approved patient education — refuse when content is missing. Start with a 14-day free trial, then scale workspaces as locations grow.
Key Capabilities:
- Grounded FAQs for patients
- Website widget and optional WhatsApp
- Business actions through your APIs
- Internal Portal for hygiene protocols
- Workspace isolation and RBAC
- Citations and safe refusal behavior
FAQs:
  Q: Is Qefro built for dental clinics?
  A: Yes. Teams configure knowledge and channels for a dental practice, then deploy Customer AI for patients and Employee AI for staff — without building RAG infrastructure.
  Q: Can it connect to our scheduling or order systems?
  A: Yes. Import OpenAPI or configure REST Business Tools, or use the Backend SDK for authenticated workflows in your stack.
  Q: How fast can we launch?
  A: Most teams embed the website widget in minutes, then upload policies or crawl the site. API actions depend on your integration readiness.

## AI Customer Support for Clinics (https://qefro.com/ai-customer-support-for-clinics)

Typical questions include “What are your visiting hours?”, “How do I get lab results?”, and “Where do I park for my appointment?”. Qefro grounds replies in your uploaded policies, crawled site pages, and handbooks, with source citations and refusal when nothing relevant exists. Credentials stay encrypted; actions can use end-user identity via identify(). Staff get a branded Internal Portal for nursing SOPs, referral policies, and intake checklists, while Customer AI stays on the channels you enable. Embed on the clinic site; use WhatsApp where patients already message staff. Separate public FAQs from internal clinical protocols with workspace isolation.   A: Yes. Import OpenAPI or configure REST Business Tools, or use the Backend SDK for authenticated workflows in your stack.

  A: Most teams embed the website widget in minutes, then upload policies or crawl the site. API actions depend on your integration readiness.

Direct Answer: Qefro provides AI customer support for property management: cited answers for tenants, optional WhatsApp, secure business actions, and staff assistants in one AI Workspace Platform.
Overview: AI customer support for property management helps tenants get fast, accurate answers about your property portfolio — without hiring a 24/7 team for every repetitive question. Typical questions include “How do I submit a maintenance request?”, “When is rent due?”, and “How do I renew my lease?”. Qefro grounds replies in your uploaded policies, crawled site pages, and handbooks, with source citations and refusal when nothing relevant exists. When chat must do more than answer, connect your systems: create a maintenance work order via your api; share lease faq excerpts with citations; route payment questions to your billing workflow. Credentials stay encrypted; actions can use end-user identity via identify(). Direct Answer: Qefro provides AI customer support for banks & credit unions: cited answers for members and customers, optional WhatsApp, secure business actions, and staff assistants in one AI Workspace Platform.
Overview: AI customer support for banks & credit unions helps members and customers get fast, accurate answers about your financial institution — without hiring a 24/7 team for every repetitive question. Typical questions include “How do I report a lost card?”, “What are wire cut-off times?”, and “Where are fee schedules?”. Qefro grounds replies in your uploaded policies, crawled site pages, and handbooks, with source citations and refusal when nothing relevant exists. When chat must do more than answer, connect your systems: create a secure-messaging or branch ticket; cite fee schedules from published disclosures; escalate fraud concerns to human specialists immediately. Credentials stay encrypted; actions can use end-user identity via identify(). Staff get a branded Internal Portal for branch ops manuals and fraud playbooks, while Customer AI stays on the channels you enable. Authenticated widget with identify(); public pages for product FAQs only. Regulated advice stays with licensed staff; AI cites disclosures and routes securely. Start with a 14-day free trial, then scale workspaces as locations grow.
Key Capabilities:
- Grounded FAQs for members and customers
- Website widget and optional WhatsApp
- Business actions through your APIs
- Internal Portal for branch ops manuals and fraud playbooks
- Workspace isolation and RBAC
- Citations and safe refusal behavior
FAQs:
  Q: Is Qefro built for banks & credit unions?
  A: Yes. Teams configure knowledge and channels for a financial institution, then deploy Customer AI for members and customers and Employee AI for staff — without building RAG infrastructure.
  Q: Can it connect to our scheduling or order systems?
  A: Yes. Import OpenAPI or configure REST Business Tools, or use the Backend SDK for authenticated workflows in your stack.
  Q: How fast can we launch?
  A: Most teams embed the website widget in minutes, then upload policies or crawl the site. API actions depend on your integration readiness.

- Website widget and optional WhatsApp
- Business actions through your APIs
- Internal Portal for store ops and animal-care SOPs
- Workspace isolation and RBAC
- Citations and safe refusal behavior
FAQs:
  Q: Is Qefro built for pet stores?
  A: Yes. Teams configure knowledge and channels for a pet retail, then deploy Customer AI for pet owners and Employee AI for staff — without building RAG infrastructure.
  Q: Can it connect to our scheduling or order systems?
  A: Yes. Import OpenAPI or configure REST Business Tools, or use the Backend SDK for authenticated workflows in your stack.
  Q: How fast can we launch?
  A: Most teams embed the website widget in minutes, then upload policies or crawl the site. API actions depend on your integration readiness.

## AI Customer Support for Cafes & Coffee Shops (https://qefro.com/ai-customer-support-for-cafes)
Kind: Vertical
Title: AI Customer Support for Cafes & Coffee Shops | Qefro
Description: AI customer support for cafes & coffee shops with Qefro — grounded answers for guests, website and WhatsApp chat, secure API actions, and an Internal Portal for staff.
Direct Answer: Qefro provides AI customer support for cafes & coffee shops: cited answers for guests, optional WhatsApp, secure business actions, and staff assistants in one AI Workspace Platform.
Overview: AI customer support for cafes & coffee shops helps guests get fast, accurate answers about your cafe group — without hiring a 24/7 team for every repetitive question. Typical questions include “Do you have oat milk?”, “What are catering minimums?”, and “Where is Wi-Fi info?”. Qefro grounds replies in your uploaded policies, crawled site pages, and handbooks, with source citations and refusal when nothing relevant exists. When chat must do more than answer, connect your systems: capture catering leads; share allergen menus with citations; create a store-manager ticket for complaints. Credentials stay encrypted; actions can use end-user identity via identify(). Staff get a branded Internal Portal for barista SOPs and opening checklists, while Customer AI stays on the channels you enable. Website widget; WhatsApp for catering. Allergen info must track current menu documents. Start with a 14-day free trial, then scale workspaces as locations grow.
Key Capabilities:
- Grounded FAQs for guests
- Website widget and optional WhatsApp
- Business actions through your APIs
- Internal Portal for barista SOPs and opening checklists
- Workspace isolation and RBAC
- Citations and safe refusal behavior
FAQs:
  Q: Is Qefro built for cafes & coffee shops?
  A: Yes. Teams configure knowledge and channels for a cafe group, then deploy Customer AI for guests and Employee AI for staff — without building RAG infrastructure.
  Q: Can it connect to our scheduling or order systems?
  A: Yes. Import OpenAPI or configure REST Business Tools, or use the Backend SDK for authenticated workflows in your stack.
  Q: How fast can we launch?
  A: Most teams embed the website widget in minutes, then upload policies or crawl the site. API actions depend on your integration readiness.

## AI Customer Support for Facilities Management (https://qefro.com/ai-customer-support-for-facilities)
Kind: Vertical
Title: AI Customer Support for Facilities Management | Qefro
Description: AI customer support for facilities management with Qefro — grounded answers for occupants and vendors, website and WhatsApp chat, secure API actions, and an Internal Portal for staff.
Direct Answer: Qefro provides AI customer support for facilities management: cited answers for occupants and vendors, optional WhatsApp, secure business actions, and staff assistants in one AI Workspace Platform.
Overview: AI customer support for facilities management helps occupants and vendors get fast, accurate answers about your facilities organization — without hiring a 24/7 team for every repetitive question. Typical questions include “How do I report a building issue?”, “What are loading-dock hours?”, and “How do visitor badges work?”. Qefro grounds replies in your uploaded policies, crawled site pages, and handbooks, with source citations and refusal when nothing relevant exists. When chat must do more than answer, connect your systems: create a work order via your cmms api; cite building handbook pages; capture vendor access requests. Credentials stay encrypted; actions can use end-user identity via identify(). Staff get a branded Internal Portal for EHS procedures and vendor manuals, while Customer AI stays on the channels you enable. Occupant portal chat; staff Internal Portal. Safety incidents need approved scripts and immediate human escalation paths. Start with a 14-day free trial, then scale workspaces as locations grow.
Key Capabilities:
- Grounded FAQs for occupants and vendors
- Website widget and optional WhatsApp
- Business actions through your APIs
- Internal Portal for EHS procedures and vendor manuals
- Workspace isolation and RBAC
- Citations and safe refusal behavior
FAQs:
  Q: Is Qefro built for facilities management?
  A: Yes. Teams configure knowledge and channels for a facilities organization, then deploy Customer AI for occupants and vendors and Employee AI for staff — without building RAG infrastructure.
  Q: Can it connect to our scheduling or order systems?
  A: Yes. Import OpenAPI or configure REST Business Tools, or use the Backend SDK for authenticated workflows in your stack.
  Q: How fast can we launch?
  A: Most teams embed the website widget in minutes, then upload policies or crawl the site. API actions depend on your integration readiness.
